summary: Color-graded, edited video with captions and a music bed. Shots include an aerial view of a large light-colored jail and sheriff's office building complex surrounded by trees and parking, intercut with a uniformed county sheriff giving a to-camera testimonial. Burned-in captions appear (for example 'reducing operating costs in the jail'). The audio includes the sheriff describing federal and state collaboration under a 287(g) agreement. The tweet text names a Florida county sheriff.

script.scene: Aerial drone shot of a large jail and sheriff's office building complex with parking and trees; caption 'reducing operating costs in the jail.'
